state_analysis: timg was installed and printed its help, likely because the flags used were incorrect (-w is wait time, -h is help). We should use -g <w>x<h> to set the display geometry and render the image clearly in the terminal to read the position.
explanation: Render the chess_board.png using timg with a large geometry for clarity. After viewing the board, we can determine the best move and then write it to /app/move.txt.
